feature.title: GitHub Copilot Rollout via Existing Agent Guidance

notes: No new Copilot custom agents or skills are part of this rollout.
Existing AGENTS.md, package guides, Codex config, and Claude workflows remain the source of truth.
This rollout is GitHub-platform and CI/CD first, not editor/autocomplete focused.
Admin, client, and agent are first-class rollout packages and each has a dedicated pilot scope, while shared, contracts, and indexer also receive explicit coverage.
Protect high-risk paths before enabling broader Copilot review or cloud-agent behavior.
Automatic PR review with reruns on new pushes is the current GitHub-native fit for commit-level review.
Automatic review is limited to open pull requests targeting main or develop, and cost controls are required before rollout.
Repo-backed rollout artifacts are implemented under .github; automatic review rulesets, Security & quality toggles, and premium-request budgets still require manual GitHub configuration.

history.details: Created active rollout hub for GitHub Copilot adoption using existing Green Goods agent guidance, with explicit package focus on admin, client, and agent.

Added repo-wide and package-specific Copilot instruction files, CODEOWNERS protection, CodeQL scanning for JavaScript/TypeScript plus GitHub Actions, a manual GitHub settings checklist, and conservative GitHub Actions Dependabot updates.
